title: Temporal graph ontology definition
description: Validates ontology JSON files loaded from ontologies/{id}.json. Used by temporal_graph.ontology.loader before Pydantic parsing.

schema_version.description: Schema format version for this file (not the ontology vocabulary version).

id.description: Stable slug; must match the filename stem (e.g. company_data.json → id "company_data"). Used in ingest payloads as ontology_id.

name.description: Human-readable ontology title for prompts and metadata.

ontology_version.description: Version string stored on graph nodes with extractions (e.g. 1.1).

description.description: Optional prose for operators and LLM context.

predicate_groups.description: Override predicate groups for invalidation expansion; null loads predicates/groups.yml.

event_tree.description: Map canonical_event → node with subevents and optional default_normalized_subtype.

invalidationConfig.description: Temporal invalidation: embedding similarity gate + publish_date proximity + optional per-subevent hours.

similarity_threshold.description: Minimum cosine similarity (0–1) for candidate fact pairs before LLM invalidation.

top_k.description: Max embedding-similar neighbors considered per fact.

default_publish_date_threshold_hours.description: Hours within which document publish dates must fall to allow invalidation; 0 uses env DEFAULT_INVALIDATION_PUBLISH_DATE_THRESHOLD_HOURS.

subevent_publish_date_threshold_hours.description: Per canonical_subevent override (hours). Keys must match subevents under some canonical_event.

subevents.description: List of allowed canonical_subevent strings, or a map of subevent → optional default subtype metadata.

default_normalized_subtype.description: Fallback normalized subtype when ingest does not supply one (often equals a primary subevent).

subeventDictEntry.description: Metadata for one subevent when subevents is an object. Empty object is valid.

normalized_subtype.description: Alias for default_normalized_subtype (either may be read by the loader).
